title: Trace mining to dataset pipeline
goal: Build a nightly job that turns production failure traces into curated eval dataset artifacts.
constraints: Use deterministic dedup and clustering strategy.
verify_command: pnpm test --filter trace-miner && pnpm run trace-miner:dry-run
definition_of_done: Pipeline exports dataset artifact and summary changelog.
Dry run mode works without mutating remote datasets.
rollback_note: If pipeline quality is poor, pause dataset promotion and keep previous stable dataset versions pinned in eval runs.
